title: Fuzzer: Segfault on illegal port use
body:
---


Author Name: **Eric Rippey**
Original Redmine Issue: 1585 from https://www.veripool.org

Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

With the attached testcase, runing:

verilator_bin --lint-only 3.sv

with version:

Verilator 4.020 devel rev v4.020-56-gbcb766b

Produces:
```
%Error: 3.sv:3: Unsupported: Member call on non-enum object 'VARREF 'a'' which is a 'BASICDTYPE 'logic''
               : ... In instance m1
  m2 t(a.f());
          ^
Segmentation fault (core dumped)

```
